sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24980" key="diakollhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διᾰκολλ-ητικός</orth>, prob.<sense id="n24980.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διακωλυτικός, ἔργα</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:209" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.209</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
